titleStmt.title: SII 9.671: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 671. (A.R. No. 543 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE KESAVASVAMI TEMPLE AT BUDURU, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1482, Raudri, Vaiśākha, śu. 15 corresponding to A.D. 1560 May 9, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya ruling at Vidyānagara. It records that Ādavāni-sīme was the amaramāgaṇi of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Veṅkaṭādrirāja-Ayya, that Būdūru in that district was the amaramāgaṇi of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gobūri-Avubhalarājaya and that the latter made a gift of some plots of land for the service of the god Ahōbala-Nārasiṁha in the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśi
rastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē taiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbāya śaṁbhavē . sva
sti śrījayābhyudayaśālivā
hanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1482
neya raudrisaṁvacarada vayi
śākha śu 15 lu śrīmadrājā
dhirāja paramāśara śrīvī
rapratāpa śrīsadasivadēva
mahārāyarugaḷu vidyānaga
radalli ratnasiṁhāsanāruḍhanāgi
prituvīrājyaṁgeyutiralu śrīma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara sōmavaṁśā
dhīsvara veṁkaṭādrirāja Ayinava
rige Āmaramāgaṇige pālisi
da Ādāvānisīme Ā sīmevoḷa
gaṇa būdūru Eṁba grāmava
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara go
būri Avubhaḷarājayanavari
ge vuṁbaḷige pālisida būdū
ra grāma Ā grāmadalu Ida A
hōbaḷanārasihyadēvarige
sōmagrāhaṇa pu(ṁ)ṇyakāla

dalu naividya dīpā
rādhanege samarpisi
da holana Araku
ṁṭe catusīme ho
lanu 3 sivanaku
ṁṭege mūḍalu
2 Ubhayaṁ kha . 0 . yi
dake Āradaru tapi
naḍavaru vāraṇāsi
lu gōbrāmaṇana va
dhisida karmadalu
hōharu .
hola kha . ĀLines 37 to 39 are written at
yigaḷada mosa
bu .
Digital edition of SII 9.671 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
